body:
Updates the expression for kinetic energy computation using covariant velocity components.
Updates the corresponding equations in online documentation. 
Decreases timesteps in EDMF cases (BOMEX-JFNK, BOMEX-compressible and Soares). 

Closes #1293
title: Update kinetic energy computation
